sections.paragraph:
Ἰωακίμ, ὁ (יְהוֹיָקִים;-κείμ GJs, cp. Ἐλιακίμ) indecl. (also JosAs 1:14, s. Ἰεχονίας) Joachim/Jehoiakim Mt 1:11 v.l.; Lk 3:23ff D.—Father of Mary GJs 1:1, 4 (twice); 4:2 (three times); 4:3f (four times); 5:1 (twice); 6:2 (twice); 7:1 (twice); 7:2.

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 485
